prompts.description: Pre-planning consultant for requirements analysis (THOROUGH)
API contracts, backward compatibility, versioning, error semantics
Strategic Architecture & Debugging Advisor (THOROUGH, READ-ONLY)
Build and compilation error resolution specialist (minimal diffs, no architecture changes)
Expert code review specialist with severity-rated feedback
Simplifies and refines code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability while preserving all functionality. Focuses on recently modified code unless instructed otherwise.
Work plan review expert and critic (THOROUGH)
Root-cause analysis, regression isolation, stack trace analysis
Dependency Expert - External SDK/API/Package Evaluator
UI/UX Designer-Developer for stunning interfaces (STANDARD)
Autonomous deep executor for goal-oriented implementation (STANDARD)
Codebase search specialist for finding files and code patterns
Git expert for atomic commits, rebasing, and history management with style detection
Information hierarchy, taxonomy, navigation models, and naming consistency (STANDARD)
Hotspots, algorithmic complexity, memory/latency tradeoffs, profiling plans
Strategic planning consultant with interview workflow (THOROUGH)
Product metrics, event schemas, funnel analysis, and experiment measurement design (STANDARD)
Problem framing, value hypothesis, prioritization, and PRD generation (STANDARD)
Interactive CLI testing specialist using tmux for session management
Logic defects, maintainability, anti-patterns, SOLID principles
Quality strategy, release readiness, risk assessment, and quality gates (STANDARD)
External Documentation & Reference Researcher
Security vulnerability detection specialist (OWASP Top 10, secrets, unsafe patterns)
Lightweight Sisyphus-style specialized worker behavior prompt for fast bounded work
Formatting, naming conventions, idioms, lint/style conventions
Team execution specialist for supervised, conservative team delivery
Test strategy, integration/e2e coverage, flaky test hardening, TDD workflows
Usability research, heuristic audits, and user evidence synthesis (STANDARD)
Completion evidence and verification specialist (STANDARD)
Visual/media file analyzer for images, PDFs, and diagrams
Technical documentation writer for README, API docs, and comments
